title: Autonomous cooking device for making idly, dosas, omelets, crepes, pancakes, and the like
abstract: An autonomous convertible cooking device is disclosed, wherein the cooking device comprises a platform (103) with grooves (116) for accommodating a gantry (112) and a pan structure (105). The cooking device also comprises a cylindrical container (104) to store batter. It has a pushing means (106) to discharge the batter atop of the pan (102) for cooking. It comprises a heating pan structure (105) mounted on a platform (103) through the grooves (116) provided on its sides for heating the batter. The cooking device also comprises a gantry (112) with a slider (110) provisioned to deliver three way sliding of the container (104) and the slider (110). The cooking device further comprises a C-shaped arm (108) to carry out the cooked batter as a roll by sliding through the grooves (114) on the platform. It has an input/output device for a user to access the autonomous cooking device, and to enter preferences, type of dish to be prepared, quantity of dish to be cooked based on number of persons or equivalent calories the person(s) wish to take.
